Table 5: SDPI value-learning configurations. For SPINN, (r, g) denotes rank and group size.

Figure 1: Proof map for the stability and convergence of the proposed semi-discrete PINN policy iteration. The analysis branch connects the dynamics identification error ηn to the one-step L2 value-error bound (Theorem 1) and propagates it through the greedy policy sensitivity to establish multi-step PI convergence (Corollary 1).
